violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean. A box of straws were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Single serve cups were observed stored on a counter. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024

The cutting board in the front service area is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. PIC disposed of during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezers have an accumulation of ice and food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the counters and shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

The following areas throughout the establishment have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -hand sinks -3-bay sinks -floors -walls behind fryer -pipes at 3-bay sink and in mop room -curtains -counter between 3-bay sink and water dispenser. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024

The soffit in the kitchen ceiling area over the hand sink is in poor repair. PIC stated the damage was from a prior leak. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
